page_metadata.biotools__summary: A complete network for ascorbic acid (including associated pathways) with a list of the identified genetic variants in tomato genome through a methodology that integrates gene annotations and transcriptome. It represents the only available collection, exhaustive and detailed, on ascorbic acid network in tomato.

It represents the only available collection, exhaustive and detailed, on ascorbic acid network in tomato.
